sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70692" key="nhpedano/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηπεδᾰνός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n70692.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἠπεδανός</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:409" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.409</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νήδυμος, ἥδυμος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
